headline: Analyst Says Tesla's Q4 Is A 'Trophy Case' Quarter, Why He Thinks Momentum Building Into 2022
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) on Sunday reported record deliveries for the fourth quarter as well as for the full-year 2021.

headline: Amazon Driver Rescues 4-Month-Old And Parents From Colorado Wildfire, Family Says They 'Could Be Dead' Otherwise
summary: A Colorado family says they "could be dead" if it wasn't for an Amazon.com, Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) delivery driver who rescued them during the Marshall Fire.

headline: Tesla Q4 Deliveries Beat Consensus By A Mile, Pushing Annual Sales To Nearly 1M
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) reported record quarterly and annual deliveries that exceeded the most optimistic Wall Street forecasts.

headline: Dogecoin More Popular Than Bitcoin On Reddit In 2021, Tesla Getting Into Bitcoin Among Top Posts
summary: According to Reddit’s end-of-year survey, the Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) subreddit was more popular than Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in 202

headline: Tesla Announced Q4 Production of More Than 305,000 Vehicles; Q4 Deliveries of Over 308,000 Vehicles; Full Year 2021 Deliveries of Over 936,000 Vehicles
Tesla Rival Nio's December Deliveries Slip 3.6% From November, But More Than Double From Previous Year
summary: Xpeng Inc (NYSE: XPEV) on Saturday outshone homegrown peer Nio Inc (NYSE: NIO) for a second straight month in electric vehicle deliveries helping it speed past its ace rival for the full year volumes as well.

headline: China to Cut EV Subsidies By 30% In 2022: What That Means For Tesla, Nio, XPeng And Others
summary: China has confirmed subsidy reduction for new energy vehicles (NEV), beginning in 2022, and it is early to assess whether it will impact EV adoption in the hot-and-happening Chinese economy. NEVs include EVs, plug-in hybrids and hydrogen fuel-cell energy vehicles.
